reviews.review_description:
When you're not in a lobby, the game looks amazing. Playermodels are great, colour is great. But then, you join a lobby. Your arms are above your head, you're not green, you're black for some reason. $15 FOR MODS. Cashgrab alert. They're profiting from flushys name for money. Flushy is a great creator, but i knew something was up when he got a fan game made when he had less than 200k. Faaduu had more and didn't get a fan game. The game was made in less than 2 weeks, in pretty sure.


C A S H G R A B

They just fixed the game a bit... what is that green thing at the bottom of my screen? Still a cashgrab. $15.00 for 3 mods!?!? рҹӨ“ Uhm, actually, it's $14.99. For some reason, the mods are free. I think it's a glitch. I just tested them. Platforms are terrible. You can only use them with the menu open. It's almost impossible to activate mods. Tested even more. You can only activate all the mods at once. Fly doesn't work. Carmonke is terrible. I feel bad for everyone who bought these. They need to give a refund and give up on this 

I started telling others that this game is a cashgrab... Icy perma-banned me. That is proof he is trying to shut me up. I have an alt account, so im gonna go on that and warn even more people that this game is a cashgrab. So to icy and devvy... Womp womp рҹҺәрҹҺә 

Responding to the dev response. Im pretty sure icy responded. I didn't buy the mods. I had them for free, same with everyone else. I also met flushy on the game. I'm not saying anything about that. But i was shocked nevertheless. Icy told me that there are now 5 mods. Ghost monke,  rgb monke, platforms, fly and carmonke. They probably are hard to activate. The servers don't even work half the time. I can only join private servers!

developer_response.body: Im so sorry please don't violate the game rules by hacking/cheating and this is not a cash grab and im not trying to profit of flushys name it will be all changed soon also im young and want to make some moneyрҹӨ·вҖҚвҷӮпёҸ
